name: Olympic Auto Sales
description_short: Used car dealership in Decatur, GA offering in-house auto financing with rates as low as 9.9% APR, serving customers regardless of credit history.
description_long:
Olympic Auto Sales is a used car dealership located in Decatur, Georgia, serving the Atlanta metropolitan area including Brookhaven, Clarkston, Stone Mountain, and surrounding communities. The dealership specializes in offering quality used vehicles combined with in-house financing solutions designed to make car ownership accessible across different credit profiles.

The company offers a diverse inventory of used cars, trucks, and SUVs from multiple brands, with each vehicle undergoing thorough inspection before sale. Their primary financial service is in-house auto financing with advertised rates as low as 9.9% APR, positioned as an alternative to traditional bank or third-party lender financing. They also provide buy-here-pay-here services, trade-in options, protection plans, and low down payment requirements to reduce barriers to purchase.

Olympic Auto Sales distinguishes itself by consolidating multiple services under one roof—vehicle selection, financing approval, trade-ins, and warranty/protection plans. They emphasize fast approval timelines (often same-day), minimal paperwork, and transparent pricing with no hidden fees. The dealership explicitly welcomes applicants with good credit, bad credit, or no credit history, positioning credit-building through timely payments as a stated benefit.

As a used car dealership with integrated financing rather than a dedicated personal lender, Olympic Auto Sales operates in a hybrid space. While their core business is vehicle sales, their prominent promotion of in-house financing and flexible approval processes for borrowers across credit tiers makes them functionally a captive auto finance operation. The stated interest rates and credit-building messaging align with auto lending rather than unsecured personal loans.
pros: In-house financing bypasses banks and third-party lenders, enabling faster same-day approvals with minimal paperwork
Advertised interest rates as low as 9.9% APR, positioned as competitive pricing in a high-inflation environment
Serves applicants with bad credit or no credit history, offering approval regardless of credit profile
Low down payment options explicitly designed to reduce upfront affordability barriers
All-in-one dealership model: vehicle selection, financing, trade-ins, and protection plans under one location
Each vehicle undergoes thorough pre-sale inspection to ensure quality and performance
Flexible payment plans customized to individual customer needs and budgets
cons: 9.9% APR advertised as 'low' but is substantially higher than traditional bank auto loan rates (typically 4-8% for qualified borrowers)
No transparency provided on actual approval rates, credit score requirements, or whether all applicants qualify for advertised rates
Limited information on loan terms, payment periods, or total cost of financing; rates may be higher for subprime borrowers
As a used car dealership, financing is tied to vehicle purchase—not suitable for customers needing standalone personal loans
No mention of alternative financial hardship programs, refinancing options, or consumer protections beyond standard dealer warranties
best_for: Used car buyers with fair or poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional bank financing
Borrowers seeking quick vehicle purchase approval and same-day funding without bank processing delays
Drivers in the Atlanta metro area wanting to build or rebuild credit through reportable auto loan payments
Consumers prioritizing convenience of purchasing and financing at a single dealership location
diagnosis: Olympic Auto Sales is best suited for used car buyers with fair, poor, or nonexistent credit who need rapid financing without traditional bank qualification barriers. The primary caveat is that their financing is exclusively tied to vehicle purchases; this is a captive auto lender, not a personal loan provider, and their 9.9% APR should be compared carefully against standard auto lending rates, as actual rates for subprime borrowers may be substantially higher.
services: Used car sales (sedans, trucks, SUVs from multiple brands)
In-house auto financing with rates as low as 9.9% APR
Credit-building loan programs (with reported payment history)
Inventory search by make and model
